values.name: Resilience
values.description: The ability to withstand adversity and emerge stronger is highly valued in our society.

values.name: Community
values.description: The bonds between individuals are sacred, and collective well-being takes precedence over individual gain.

values.name: Spirituality
values.description: A deep connection with the divine is essential for understanding one's place in the universe and guiding life choices.
